title: GoHighLevel Pricing India 2026: Plans from Rs 8,000/Month
description: GoHighLevel pricing for India in 2026 with all plans in INR. Starter at Rs 8,000/month, Unlimited at Rs 24,700, SaaS Pro at Rs 41,400. WhatsApp, Razorpay, UPI included.
html_content:
Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 days — Double the standard 14-day trial. No credit card required. Start your free trial here

GoHighLevel Pricing India 2026: Every Plan in Rupees

If you run a digital marketing agency in India, you have probably spent hours trying to figure out what GoHighLevel actually costs in rupees. Most pricing pages show USD only, and the conversion math gets confusing once you factor in GST, annual discounts, and which features you actually need.

This guide breaks down every GoHighLevel plan in INR, explains what each tier includes, and helps you decide which plan makes financial sense for your agency size and client load.

GoHighLevel Plans and INR Pricing (April 2026)

Plan USD/Month INR/Month (approx) Annual Billing (saves ~17%)
Starter $97 ~Rs 8,000 ~Rs 6,640/month
Unlimited $297 ~Rs 24,700 ~Rs 20,500/month
SaaS Pro $497 ~Rs 41,400 ~Rs 34,360/month

INR amounts are approximate based on current exchange rates. Annual billing saves approximately 17% compared to monthly billing. GST is additional where applicable.

What Each Plan Includes

Starter Plan: Rs 8,000/month ($97)

The Starter plan is where most solo consultants and small agencies in India begin. For Rs 8,000 per month, you get:

  • CRM with unlimited contacts
  • WhatsApp Business API automation and chatbots
  • Email marketing (unlimited sends)
  • Landing pages, forms, and funnels
  • Basic workflow automations
  • Calendar and appointment scheduling
  • Razorpay, PayU, and UPI payment integration
  • 1 sub-account (your own business or one client)

This plan is built for agencies with 1-3 team members managing a handful of clients. If you are currently paying for separate CRM, email marketing, landing page, and scheduling tools, the Starter plan replaces all of them.

Unlimited Plan: Rs 24,700/month ($297)

The Unlimited plan is where Indian agencies start to scale seriously. Everything in Starter, plus:

  • Unlimited sub-accounts (one per client)
  • Unlimited team members
  • Advanced automations and AI-powered features
  • White-label capability (brand GHL as your own platform)
  • Advanced reporting and analytics
  • API access for custom integrations
  • Priority support

This is the plan most growing agencies choose. If you manage 5+ clients, the unlimited sub-accounts alone justify the cost. You can white-label the entire platform and resell it to clients at your own markup.

SaaS Pro Plan: Rs 41,400/month ($497)

The SaaS Pro plan turns your agency into a software company. Everything in Unlimited, plus:

  • SaaS mode with Stripe/Razorpay billing for your clients
  • Custom app marketplace
  • Advanced SaaS analytics and churn tracking
  • Rebilling for phone, email, and WhatsApp usage
  • Full white-label mobile app

This plan is for agencies that want to charge clients a monthly subscription for access to the platform. Several Indian agencies are building Rs 50,000-2,00,000/month recurring revenue streams by white-labeling GHL on this plan.

Why GoHighLevel Beats Zoho CRM for Indian Agencies

Zoho is the default CRM choice for Indian businesses. It is affordable and locally supported. But here is the problem: Zoho CRM is just a CRM. To match what GoHighLevel gives you out of the box, you need Zoho CRM + Zoho Campaigns + Zoho Forms + Zoho Sites + a WhatsApp Business API provider + a separate funnel builder.

Capability GoHighLevel Starter (Rs 8,000) Zoho Equivalent Stack
CRM Included Zoho CRM: Rs 1,500-6,000/user/month
Email Marketing Unlimited sends included Zoho Campaigns: Rs 2,000-8,000/month
WhatsApp Automation Native, built-in Third-party API: Rs 3,000-5,000/month
Landing Pages Unlimited, built-in Zoho Sites or third-party: Rs 1,000-3,000/month
Funnels Built-in funnel builder ClickFunnels or similar: Rs 8,000+/month
Scheduling Built-in calendar Calendly: Rs 800-2,000/month
Payment Integration Razorpay, PayU, UPI native Separate Razorpay setup + Zapier
Total Monthly Cost Rs 8,000 Rs 16,300-32,000+

GoHighLevel replaces 7-10 separate SaaS tools. For an Indian agency running lean, that consolidation is not just about cost savings. It is about eliminating the 10-15 hours per week your team spends switching between platforms, troubleshooting integrations, and reconciling data across systems.

Save Rs 8,000-24,000/month by consolidating your tools

Most Indian agencies are paying for 5-8 separate tools that GoHighLevel replaces on day one. Start your 30-day free trial and see the difference

WhatsApp Automation: Why This Matters for India

In the US and Europe, SMS and email are the default communication channels. In India, WhatsApp is how business gets done. Your clients check WhatsApp before they check email. Your leads respond to WhatsApp messages 3-5x faster than email.

GoHighLevel includes native WhatsApp Business API automation. This is not a third-party add-on that breaks every other month. It is built into the core platform. You can:

  • Send automated follow-up sequences via WhatsApp
  • Build WhatsApp chatbots for lead qualification
  • Trigger WhatsApp messages based on CRM events (payment received, appointment booked, form submitted)
  • Broadcast messages to segmented contact lists
  • Route conversations to the right team member automatically

For Indian agencies, this single feature often justifies the entire subscription. You no longer need a separate WhatsApp Business API provider, which typically costs Rs 3,000-5,000/month on its own.

Razorpay and UPI Payment Setup

GoHighLevel integrates directly with Razorpay, PayU, and supports UPI payments. This means:

  • Clients can pay via UPI, credit card, debit card, or net banking directly from your funnels and landing pages
  • Recurring payments for monthly retainers are automated through Razorpay
  • Payment confirmations trigger CRM automations (mark client as paid, send receipt via WhatsApp, notify your team)
  • GST-compliant invoicing is built in

No more chasing clients for payments on WhatsApp while manually updating spreadsheets. The entire payment workflow is automated.

Hidden Costs You Should Know About

Transparency matters. Here are the costs beyond the base subscription:

  • WhatsApp Business API messages: WhatsApp charges per conversation (approximately Rs 0.50-1.50 per conversation depending on category). This is a Meta/WhatsApp charge, not a GHL charge.
  • Phone numbers: If you use GHL's built-in calling features, local Indian numbers have a monthly rental. Most agencies stick to WhatsApp and do not need this.
  • Email sending: Included in the plan, but high-volume senders (50,000+ emails/month) may incur additional costs.
  • Razorpay transaction fees: Standard Razorpay fees apply (2% for domestic transactions). This is a Razorpay charge, not GHL.
  • GST: 18% GST applies on the GHL subscription since it is a foreign software service. Factor this into your budgeting.

With GST factored in, the actual monthly costs become approximately:

  • Starter: Rs 8,000 + 18% GST = ~Rs 9,440
  • Unlimited: Rs 24,700 + 18% GST = ~Rs 29,146
  • SaaS Pro: Rs 41,400 + 18% GST = ~Rs 48,852

DPDP Act Compliance

India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDP Act) requires businesses to handle customer data responsibly. GoHighLevel stores data on secure cloud infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. The platform supports:

  • Consent management for data collection
  • Data export and deletion capabilities (right to erasure)
  • Audit logs for compliance documentation
  • Role-based access controls for team members

Always consult with a legal advisor to ensure your specific implementation meets DPDP Act requirements for your industry and use case.

Annual Billing: Save ~17%

GoHighLevel offers annual billing at approximately 17% discount compared to monthly billing. For Indian agencies committed to the platform, this translates to meaningful savings:

  • Starter Annual: ~Rs 79,680/year (vs Rs 96,000 monthly billing) — save Rs 16,320
  • Unlimited Annual: ~Rs 2,46,000/year (vs Rs 2,96,400 monthly billing) — save Rs 50,400
  • SaaS Pro Annual: ~Rs 4,12,320/year (vs Rs 4,96,800 monthly billing) — save Rs 84,480

If you have been using GHL for 2-3 months and know it works for your agency, switching to annual billing is a straightforward decision.

Start with the 30-day free trial before committing

Test every feature for a full month. Set up your WhatsApp automations, connect Razorpay, and run a real campaign before you pay anything. Claim your 30-day free trial

Which Plan Should You Pick?

Pick Starter (Rs 8,000/month) if:

  • You are a solo consultant or freelancer
  • You manage 1-3 clients
  • You need CRM, email, WhatsApp, and basic automations
  • You are migrating from a multi-tool setup and want to consolidate

Pick Unlimited (Rs 24,700/month) if:

  • You manage 5+ clients
  • You need unlimited sub-accounts (one per client)
  • You want to white-label and resell the platform
  • You have a team of 3+ people who need access

Pick SaaS Pro (Rs 41,400/month) if:

  • You want to build a SaaS business on top of GHL
  • You plan to charge clients monthly subscriptions for platform access
  • You want to rebill WhatsApp, email, and phone usage to clients
  • You are building a software company, not just an agency

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I pay for GoHighLevel in rupees?

GoHighLevel bills in USD. Your bank or credit card provider handles the conversion to INR. Most Indian business credit cards and Razorpay-linked accounts process this without issues. The INR amount will vary slightly based on the exchange rate at the time of billing.

Is the 30-day free trial available for Indian users?

Yes. The 30-day free trial through our link is available globally, including India. The standard trial is 14 days, but this link gives you the extended 30-day trial with full access to all features.

Does GoHighLevel work with Indian phone numbers for WhatsApp?

Yes. You can connect your Indian WhatsApp Business number (+91) to GoHighLevel. The WhatsApp Business API integration works with Indian numbers and supports all message types including template messages, session messages, and broadcast lists.

What payment methods can my clients use through GHL?

Through the Razorpay integration, your clients can pay via UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit cards, debit cards, net banking, and wallets. PayU integration is also available. This covers virtually every payment method used in India.

Is there a GoHighLevel office or support team in India?

GoHighLevel is a US-based company. Support is available via chat and email globally. There is no India-specific office, but the platform has a growing Indian user community and several Indian agency owners who share tips and strategies in the GHL community groups.

How does GST apply to the GoHighLevel subscription?

Since GoHighLevel is a foreign SaaS service, 18% GST applies under the reverse charge mechanism. Your CA can help you claim input tax credit on this. Factor the GST into your cost calculations when comparing with domestic alternatives like Zoho.
